prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on the Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, utilizing REGN's historical daily log returns from the last 5 years. This historical data allowed for the estimation of the daily mean log return (0.000213) and daily volatility (0.016348). The point estimate represents the median of the projected log-normal price distribution in 22 days. The confidence intervals are calculated by applying the estimated volatility over the 22-day horizon to define the spread around the median, assuming a log-normal distribution of prices.
